en: Wonder, wonder. What's the difference? Use wonder with an O when you ask yourself a question.
ja: wonder、wonder。違いは何？Oのwonderは自分に問いかける時。
zhTW: wonder，wonder。有什麼區別？用O的wonder是你問自己問題的時候。
vi: wonder, wonder. Khac nhau gi? Dung wonder voi O khi ban tu hoi.

en: There's something you want to know. I wonder what it is? Or to make a polite request.
ja: 知りたいことがある。何だろう？または丁寧なお願いに。
zhTW: 有些東西你想知道。我想知道那是什麼？或者禮貌地請求。
vi: Co dieu gi do ban muon biet. Toi tu hoi do la gi? Hoac de yeu cau lich su.

en: I wonder if you can help me? Use wonder with an A when someone walks slowly around a place,
ko: me. A가 들어간 wander는 누가 어떤 장소를 천천히
ja: 手伝ってもらえますか？Aのwanderは、ゆっくり歩き回る時。
zhTW: 不知道你能不能幫我？用A的wander是某人慢慢在一個地方走來走去。
vi: Khong biet ban co the giup toi khong? Dung wander voi A khi ai do di cham quanh mot noi,

en: normally with no specific plan or aim. What are you up to, George?
ko: 걸어다닐 때 써. 보통 특별한 계획 없이. 뭐 하고 있어, George? 아, 그냥
ja: 通常、特に計画や目的なく。ジョージ、何してる？
zhTW: 通常沒有特定計畫或目的。你在幹嘛George？
vi: thuong la khong co ke hoach hay muc dich cu the. Ban dang lam gi, George?

en: Oh, I'm just wandering around the office.
ja: ああ、オフィスをぶらぶらしてるだけ。
zhTW: 噢，我只是在辦公室裡逛逛。
vi: O, toi chi dang di vong quanh van phong.

en: Careful with the pronunciation. With an O, it's pronounced with an uh sound.
ko: 발음을 조심해. O가 들어가면 uh 소리로 발음돼.
ja: 発音に注意。Oの方はuhの音。
zhTW: 發音要小心。用O的時候發uh的音。
vi: Can than voi cach phat am. Voi O, phat am voi am uh.

en: Wonder. And with an A, it's pronounced with an oh sound.
ko: Wonder. A가 들어가면 oh 소리로 발음돼.
vi: Wonder. Va voi A, phat am voi am oh.

en: Wonder. I wonder why wonder is written with an A.
ko: Wander. wonder가 왜 A로 쓰이는지 궁금하네.
vi: Wander. Toi tu hoi tai sao wander viet voi A.

en: Hmm, I wonder where George is wandering off to now.
ja: うーん、ジョージはどこをぶらぶらしてるのかなあ。
zhTW: 嗯，我想知道George現在又逛到哪去了。
vi: Hm, toi tu hoi George dang di lang thang den dau.
